news.t: Lazard Asset Management Launches its First Three Active ETFS in the U.S.

holdings.infoBox: TEKY is an equity ETF with a total of 49 individual holdings. The top holdings are Alphabet stock at 5.51%, NVIDIA at 5.28%, SK hynix at 4.93%, Amazon.com at 3.87%, and Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Company at 3.71%.

overview.description: The Lazard Next Gen Technologies ETF (TEKY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in stocks based on a particular theme. The fund seeks long-term capital appreciation by actively managing a narrow portfolio of global companies involved in the developing or enabling of AI next-generation technologies. TEKY was launched on Apr 4, 2025 and is issued by Lazard.

data.title: Lazard Asset Management Launches its First Three Active ETFS in the U.S.
data.text: NEW YORK--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Today, Lazard announced the launch of its first three actively managed ETFs in the United States, offering more investors access to compelling, differentiated strategies fro...
